opportunities.name: Claude MCP (Model Context Protocol)
opportunities.description: Anthropic's open protocol for connecting AI assistants to external tools and data sources. Enables Claude to interact with databases, files, APIs.
opportunities.leverage: Build MCP server integrations for niche SaaS tools. Package as $29-99/mo connectors for industries like real estate, legal, healthcare. Low code, high margin.

opportunities.name: AutoGen / CrewAI Multi-Agent Frameworks
opportunities.description: Frameworks for orchestrating multiple AI agents to collaborate on complex tasks. Enables agent teams with specialized roles.
opportunities.leverage: Pre-built agent team templates for common workflows: research + writing + editing, sales lead gen + enrichment + outreach. Package as templates for SMBs.

opportunities.name: AI Agent Workflow Automation
opportunities.description: Combining LLM reasoning with task execution. Agents that can browse web, write code, use tools, and complete multi-step workflows autonomously.
opportunities.leverage: Build vertical-specific automation agents: 'AI employee' for accountants, lawyers, agencies. Monthly retainer model $500-2000/employee.

opportunities.name: OpenAI / Gemini Vision APIs
opportunities.description: Multimodal APIs that can analyze images, videos, documents at scale. Extract structured data from visual content with 95%+ accuracy.
opportunities.leverage: Document processing SaaS: invoices, contracts, medical forms → structured data. Charge per-document or monthly volume tiers.

opportunities.name: AI Course & Prompt Marketplace
opportunities.description: Curated collections of proven AI prompts and workflows for specific professions. Growing demand from non-technical users wanting 'AI in a box'.
opportunities.leverage: Build prompt packs for high-income niches: executives, sales, therapists, financial advisors. $47-197 per pack, affiliate revenue from AI tool referrals.

opportunities.name: ElevenLabs / Hare AI Voice APIs
opportunities.description: Production-quality voice synthesis with emotional range, cloning, and real-time streaming. Quality rivaling human voice actors.
opportunities.leverage: Voice-over SaaS for content creators, educators, gaming. Auto-generate course narrations, YouTube dubs, audiobook narration. Subscription model.

opportunities.name: LangChain / LlamaIndex RAG
opportunities.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation frameworks for building knowledge bases on private data. Connect documents, databases, APIs to LLMs.
opportunities.leverage: Enterprise knowledge base tool: company documents + AI = internal chat assistant. $299-999/mo per company seat. High-touch enterprise sales.

opportunities.name: AI Meeting Intelligence
opportunities.description: Real-time transcription, summarization, action item extraction from meetings. Integrates with Zoom, Teams, Meet.
opportunities.leverage: Vertical meeting tools: therapist notes, lawyer case summaries, recruiter interview scoring. Per-seat monthly subscription.
